title: Upscaled PBR
description: 🌟✨This Pack Adds PBR For The Pack VanillaXBR 🦗 By @misterk7_- 📌 It Is Still WIP But Updates Will Be Released✨🌟
body: 🌟✨This Pack Adds PBR For Almost Every Block And Entity To The Resource Pack VanillaXBR By [misterk7_-](https://modrinth.com/user/misterk7_-)📌 Which Have Been Upscaled I Recommend You To Download [VanillaXBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillaxbr)🦗 And Put It Under This Pack & Use Chocapic13/Complementary/Nostalgia Shaders With This| Make Sure To Set The POM Depth To 0.25(If Using [Chocapic13](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/chocapic13-shaders/files/3059792)🎇 <Mainly Used For Testing During Creation Process>) | [Youtube Showcase 1](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c-1DgX--pr0)✅👍🏻, [Youtube Showcase Ri (Don't Watch!)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ)❌🤞🏻 Not Really Setup Yet But Ig You Can Follow : [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/technotblade)✨🌟
